title: A great list of questions for a bank’s leadership
author: Chris M Skinner

The post A great list of questions for a bank’s leadership appeared first on Chris Skinner's blog.
full_text:
I was just having a chat with an AI engine asking about the most common questions people ask about cryptocurrencies. Really interesting answer so, I thought I would share it here (with my edits), as I’d be really interested in your views and answers. Equally, I’m tempted to say that this should be a test given to any bank’s leadership, as they should be able to answer at least one question.

 Basic Cryptocurrency Questions

What is cryptocurrency?

How does cryptocurrency differ from traditional money?

What problem was Bitcoin originally designed to solve?

What is the role of blockchain in cryptocurrencies?

Why do cryptocurrencies have value?

What is decentralisation and why is it important?

What is the difference between a coin and a token?

What determines the price of a cryptocurrency?

 Technology and Blockchain

How does a blockchain work?

What is a distributed ledger?

What is proof-of-work?

What is proof-of-stake?

How do smart contracts work?

What are the main differences between Bitcoin and Ethereum?

What are Layer 2 scaling solutions?

What is a blockchain fork?

What are validators and miners?

 Security and Risks

How secure are cryptocurrencies?

What are private keys and public keys?

What happens if you lose your private key?

What are the most common crypto scams?

How do crypto exchanges get hacked?

What are cold wallets and hot wallets?

How does blockchain prevent double spending?

 Economics and Finance

Are cryptocurrencies money, assets, or commodities?

What drives cryptocurrency volatility?

How do stablecoins maintain price stability?

What is tokenomics?

How do crypto markets differ from traditional financial markets?

Can cryptocurrencies replace banks?

What role could crypto play in global payments?

 Regulation and Governance

How are cryptocurrencies regulated in different countries?

Should governments regulate crypto more heavily?

How do regulators view stablecoins?

What is the relationship between cryptocurrencies and central bank digital currencies (CBDCs)?

Can crypto be used to avoid financial regulation?

 Use Cases and Applications

What real-world problems does cryptocurrency solve?

How is crypto used in cross-border payments?

What is decentralised finance (DeFi)?

How are NFTs related to blockchain technology?

What is tokenisation of real-world assets?

How might crypto change banking?

 Future of Cryptocurrency

Will cryptocurrencies become mainstream?

Could governments ban cryptocurrencies?

Will Bitcoin remain the dominant cryptocurrency?

What role will crypto play in the future financial system?

How might AI and crypto intersect?

Could tokenised assets replace traditional securities?

 Critical Thinking

Is cryptocurrency a bubble or a financial revolution?

Is Bitcoin digital gold?

Are stablecoins safer than bank deposits?

Can decentralised finance replace traditional finance?

Is crypto environmentally sustainable?

Will blockchain transform the financial system or remain niche?

 

Chris M Skinner

Chris Skinner is best known as an independent commentator on the financial markets through his blog, TheFinanser.com, as author of the bestselling book Digital Bank, and Chair of the European networking forum the Financial Services Club. He has been voted one of the most influential people in banking by The Financial Brand (as well as one of the best blogs), a FinTech Titan (Next Bank), one of the Fintech Leaders you need to follow (City AM, Deluxe and Jax Finance), as well as one of the Top 40 most influential people in financial technology by the Wall Street Journal's Financial News.
